accommodations.text: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.
Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work

accommodations.text: Do not grade spelling on first-draft written work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not grade spelling on first-draft written work

accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.
